expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses (pending, in progress, done)",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status column and migration",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task to store a status so the system can track pending, in progress, or done.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'",
        "Migration applies without data loss",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["db/migrations/xxxx_add_task_status.sql", "src/models/task.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task's status so the system records status changes.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add API or server action to update task status",
        "Status change persists to DB",
        "Unit tests for server logic pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/services/taskService.ts", "src/routes/tasks.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see a status badge on task cards so I can quickly identify status.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display status badge with text Pending/In progress/Done",
        "Visual matches design guidance",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/components/TaskCard.tsx", "src/styles/task-badge.css"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control to task rows/list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change status from the task list so I can update tasks inline.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add control (dropdown or quick-action) to change status from list",
        "Changing status calls backend action and updates UI immediately",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/components/TaskList.tsx", "src/components/StatusControl.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status filter to task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so I can focus on pending or completed work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add filter UI with options All, Pending, In progress, Done",
        "Filter queries backend or client-side list correctly",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/pages/TaskListPage.tsx", "src/hooks/useTaskFilter.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
